name: Delta SkyMiles® Gold American Express Card
effective_cost: Low if you check a bag on Delta

verdict.text: Worth it if you check bags on Delta more than once a year

earn_note: Entry-level SkyMiles earning — 2× on Delta, dining, and groceries, 1× on everything else. This card is worth carrying for the free bag and Delta-side benefits, not for how it earns.

points.note: Same SkyMiles currency and dynamic pricing as the Platinum and Reserve tiers — this card just earns it more slowly.

transfer_partners.highlight: SkyMiles can't be transferred out — they're stuck in Delta's program.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: You can transfer INTO SkyMiles from Amex MR (1:1), Chase UR and Capital One — useful for topping up an award.

credits.name: Free Checked Bags
credits.subtitle: 1st (worldwide) + 2nd (domestic)
credits.description: First checked bag free on Delta flights worldwide (you + up to 8 on the reservation); second bag free on domestic flights.
tips: The single biggest reason to carry this card if you check bags on Delta — one round trip with a checked bag covers most of the $150 fee.

credits.name: Rideshare Credit
credits.subtitle: $10/mo · after first renewal
credits.description: Monthly U.S. rideshare credit with select providers — but it only starts after your first card renewal, not from day one.
tips: Doesn't kick in until your card has renewed once — new cardholders get nothing from this in year one.

credits.name: Delta Stays Credit
credits.subtitle: prepaid hotels · calendar year
credits.description: Up to $100/yr on prepaid hotels or vacation rentals booked through Delta Stays on delta.com.
tips: Only worth it if you'd book a Delta Stays property anyway — resets on the calendar year, not renewal.

credits.name: Delta Flight Credit
credits.subtitle: $200 · after $10,000/yr spend
credits.description: A $200 statement credit toward a future Delta flight purchase, but only after you spend $10,000 on the card in a calendar year.
tips: The $10,000 spend threshold is real money on a low-fee card — don't count this credit unless you're already going to hit that spend.

protection_note: The clearest gap versus the Platinum and Reserve tiers: no trip cancellation/interruption insurance at all. Trip delay coverage is actually better than the Platinum's ($500/6hrs vs $300/12hrs) — an odd inversion, but real.
rental_note: Secondary only — it pays after your own auto policy. Put rentals on a card with free primary coverage (Venture X, Sapphire Reserve) if you rent often.

services.name: Priority boarding
services.detail: Zone 5 priority boarding on Delta flights.

services.name: In-flight purchase credit
services.detail: 20% back as a statement credit on Delta in-flight purchases (food, drinks, Wi-Fi).

services.name: Award travel discount
services.detail: 15% off Delta award flights booked with miles.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Free to add — no annual fee for additional Gold cards
1st free checked bag when flying Delta
Shares the account's credits — no separate set

additional_cards.note: Additional Delta Gold cards are free, and each one extends the free-checked-bag perk to that cardholder when flying Delta.

timeline.text: Added a complimentary second checked bag on domestic Delta-operated flights and a $120 annual rideshare credit — no fee increase.
